refinement_decisions.rationale: Consistently negative ROI across all 5 symbols and both windows. Signal count is high (3000) confirming the strategy fires frequently but loses money reliably. Classic momentum in Taiwan market (ETF + large cap stocks) shows anti-momentum behaviour in this data period. No refinement path identified.
refinement_decisions.data_snooping_risk: LOW — decision is based on universal failure, not cherry-picked windows
refinement_decisions.allowed_action: Mark status=retired in registry on next registry maintenance cycle

refinement_decisions.rationale: Overall negative ROI, but symbol 2317 showed locally positive ROI (+0.379). This asymmetry warrants observation rather than immediate retirement. However, symbol-specific positive results carry HIGH data snooping risk — must not be used to drive threshold tuning.
refinement_decisions.data_snooping_risk: HIGH — positive result on single symbol (2317) may be noise; must not drive refinement
refinement_decisions.allowed_action: Create H012 as symbol-specific probe with promotion_allowed=false

refinement_decisions.rationale: DATA_INSUFFICIENT due to low OOS sample count in 150d window. However positive avg_roi (+0.267) and very high avg_sharpe (2.61) on OK windows is notable. Low signal count (168 across 5 symbols) is the structural problem. Cannot refine without more symbols or a longer data history. Hold until universe expands.
refinement_decisions.data_snooping_risk: MEDIUM — small sample (OK windows only) inflates Sharpe; n_oos may be too small for statistical trust
refinement_decisions.allowed_action: Hold — re-evaluate when symbol universe expands to 10+ symbols

refinement_decisions.rationale: volume_zscore_20d > 1.0 fires on only ~16% of trading days in a normal distribution. For ETFs with stable volume, this threshold is structurally too strict. The momentum component (return_20d > 0) is sound. Refinement: lower volume threshold to > 0.5 sigma to increase signal count while maintaining volume confirmation intent.
refinement_decisions.data_snooping_risk: LOW-MEDIUM — threshold relaxation is pre-specified in P3-09 diagnostics, not derived post-hoc from results

refinement_decisions.rationale: Only hypothesis with positive avg_ROI (+0.132) and positive Sharpe (+0.60) across valid windows. Failure is attributed to insufficient statistical power (permutation p-value not reaching 0.05 due to small OOS sample). P3-09 recommendation: extend hold period from 5d to 10d to allow mean-reversion to fully manifest. This is a pre-specified, theory-driven refinement.
refinement_decisions.data_snooping_risk: LOW — hold period extension is a pre-specified theory-driven change, not parameter search

refinement_decisions.rationale: Extremely low signal count (48 across all symbols/windows) because volatility_20d <= p25 AND close > max(high[-20:]) almost never co-occur. The dual filter is structurally over-restrictive. Refinement: relax breakout condition from strict new-high to near-high (>= 0.98 × 20d high) to capture near-breakout patterns. Note: very high Sharpe on small sample is not trustworthy.
refinement_decisions.data_snooping_risk: MEDIUM — high Sharpe on n=48 signals is unreliable; relaxation motivated by structural analysis not by chasing metrics

refinement_decisions.rationale: Structural impossibility: computing universe_median_return_20d requires all symbols to be loaded simultaneously on the same date. Current single-symbol validation pipeline cannot supply this. Not a hypothesis flaw — it is a pipeline architecture gap. Cannot refine until validation framework supports multi-symbol universe computation.
refinement_decisions.data_snooping_risk: NONE — no results exist to snoop
refinement_decisions.allowed_action: Block from v3 until multi-symbol pipeline is implemented (P3-11 or later)

refinement_decisions.rationale: is_etf flag filters to ETF-only, which excludes 2317, 2330, 2454 (stocks) entirely. The universe currently has only 1 ETF (0055) with sufficient data. With n=1 ETF, no BH-FDR correction is meaningful. Strategy is valid in concept but requires at least 3-5 ETF symbols. Hold until ETF universe expands.
refinement_decisions.data_snooping_risk: LOW — structural data gap, not a tuning issue
refinement_decisions.allowed_action: Hold — re-evaluate when ETF universe has 3+ symbols
